summary: Parallel review: FAIL (1 critical, 9 warning, 15 suggestion). Compound gate: PASS

findingsList.text: 🟡 `bin/lib/cron.mjs:20-31` — `readProjectNumber` duplicated from `outer-loop.mjs`; extract to shared module before a third consumer
🟡 `bin/lib/github.mjs:266` — `setProjectItemStatus` internally re-reads tracking config via CWD, creating untested coupling with the DI-tested cron path
🟡 `bin/lib/cron.mjs:69-99` — `process.exit()` in pre-flight validation couples library function to CLI lifecycle
🟡 `STATE.json:9-112` — Feature marked "completed" but 10 of 13 tasks show "blocked" status. Task tracking metadata needs reconciliation.
🟡 `bin/lib/cron.mjs:104` — `listProjectItems` throwing propagates as unhandled rejection; add a catch in the outer try or a test asserting the current behavior is intentional
🟡 `test/cron-tick.test.mjs` (missing) — No test for `setProjectItemStatus` throwing on the success-path in-progress transition (lines 124-131 of cron.mjs)
🟡 `test/cron-tick.test.mjs` (missing) — No test exercises title sanitization (cron.mjs:119) — newlines, control chars, null title, >200 char title all untested
🟡 `bin/lib/cron.mjs:167` — Error message path redaction is security-relevant but untested; filesystem paths could leak to public GitHub issue comments
🟡 `bin/lib/cron.mjs:21-32` — `readProjectNumber` is a near-copy of `outer-loop.mjs:118-128`. Extract to shared utility before a third consumer appears. (Carry-forward from Architect review.)
